styleSuffix: Shot on Leica Q3 28mm Summilux at f/1.7, ISO 400, available light only, Kodak Portra 400 color grade, slight natural grain, no retouching, documentary reportage aesthetic like Magnum Photos or a WIRED magazine feature. Clean, intentional, well-organized space — minimal objects, lots of negative space, calm and focused composition. Soft background falloff, off-center framing, no one looks at camera. Somewhere in the frame is one subtle moss-green color accent (#8BAD41) — small object, fabric, mug, sticky note, plant, or sweater detail — visible but not dominant. Absolutely no text, no letters on screens, no logos, no watermarks.
humansStyleSuffix: Documentary editorial photograph, the kind you'd see in a WIRED or Monocle feature. Shot on Leica Q3 28mm or Leica M11 50mm Summilux at f/1.7, ISO 400, soft overcast north-window daylight, Kodak Portra 400 film grade, natural skin tones with visible pores, freckles, stubble, no retouching. CAUGHT IN FLAGRANTE — people in the middle of actually working and talking with each other, completely unaware of the camera, never posed, never staged. Easy good-mood energy: a relaxed soft smile, the tail end of a laugh, an attentive nod, a quiet 'huh, interesting' moment, a hand mid-gesture explaining something. Engaged, present, light-hearted, never sad, never glum, never overly serious or stressed. Real outfits: knit sweaters, button-downs, fitted hoodies, dark jeans or chinos, Converse or simple leather sneakers. The space is clean, intentional, calm — minimal modern workspace with mostly empty wood or matte-laminate surface, only the essential objects (a laptop, a notebook, a single coffee mug, a small potted plant). Lots of negative space, no clutter, no tangled cables, no scattered papers. The team is ethnically diverse with Latin American (Mexican, Argentinian, Colombian) representation alongside Black, Asian, and white people, mid-20s to early-40s, varied body types, natural imperfections. One subtle moss-green color accent (#8BAD41) somewhere in the frame — a knit sweater, a notebook cover, a highlighter, a mug, a chair cushion, a fabric strap, or a small potted plant — present but understated. Slight film grain, soft shadows, slightly desaturated highlights. Not stock photography, not corporate headshot aesthetic. Absolutely no text, no letters on screens, no logos, no watermarks.

images.prompt: Four software engineers at a clean wooden table in a quiet modern office. A Mexican woman in her early thirties with shoulder-length dark hair and a moss-green knit cardigan (color #8BAD41) leans toward a 16-inch MacBook with a soft attentive smile, the tail end of a quiet laugh on her lips. Beside her, a Black man with a short beard in a fitted gray sweater gestures mid-sentence toward an external 32-inch monitor showing a soft, abstract dark dashboard with no readable text — his hand slightly motion-blurred. Behind them stands a tall Asian man with arms relaxed, looking at the screen with a soft half-smile. A white woman with a low ponytail and tortoiseshell glasses sits at the end, jotting into a small Moleskine notebook. The desk is intentional and uncluttered — only the laptop, an external display, two ceramic mugs, and one small potted plant. Soft late-afternoon overcast light through tall steel-framed factory windows, exposed brick wall in soft focus behind. Nobody looks at the camera. Framed asymmetrically from the side.

Tight over-the-shoulder shot of a Latin American software developer in his thirties typing at a 16-inch MacBook Pro on a clean light-oak desk. He wears a slim moss-green knit sweater (#8BAD41) over a plain white tee. His hands are sharp in focus, the screen behind shows an abstract blurred dark IDE with soft color blocks of code-like shapes — no readable letters. A single white ceramic mug, a Moleskine notebook with a leather strap, and a small succulent are the only other objects on the desk. Soft north-window daylight, slight grain, no retouching, calm focused atmosphere.

A Colombian product designer in her thirties and a Black senior engineer in his late thirties stand at a clean glass whiteboard sparsely marked with a few hand-drawn user-journey diagrams and three intentionally placed sticky notes (one a moss-green #8BAD41). She wears a beige knit sweater and dark wide-leg trousers; he wears a charcoal henley. She gestures with an open palm mid-sentence; he listens with arms loosely crossed. The room is minimal — light wood floor, one matte black chair, a single tall monstera plant in the corner. Soft overcast daylight from a tall north-facing window, calm reportage framing.

A Mexican AI engineer in his early thirties working alone at a clean light-oak desk in a quiet modern office. He wears a moss-green knit sweater (color #8BAD41) over a plain white tee, dark fitted jeans, simple leather sneakers. Soft beard stubble, focused eyes behind thin wire-rim glasses. He's mid-typing on a 16-inch MacBook Pro, his other hand resting on a small Moleskine notebook with a few hand-drawn diagrams. Two clean external monitors show abstract softly-blurred dashboards with subtle color chart shapes — no readable text. A single white ceramic mug and a small potted plant are the only other objects on the desk. Behind him, a tall steel-framed window with soft overcast morning light, distant exposed-brick wall slightly out of focus. Caught mid-thought, not looking at the camera.

Two machine-learning engineers — an Argentinian woman in her late twenties wearing a fitted cream knit sweater, and a Black man in his thirties in a charcoal hoodie — stand side by side reviewing a large 32-inch monitor showing a soft, abstract object-detection demo with blurred bounding-box shapes overlaid on a darkened video frame (no readable text). Beside the monitor sits a single moss-green (#8BAD41) coffee mug. Clean wooden desk, minimal objects, calm composition. Soft north-window daylight, slight motion in her hand pointing at the screen, neither looks at the camera.
